questions.question: Why does the CrossChainLottery contract inherit from RandomnessReceiverBase?
options: To request random numbers from the threshold network and receive callbacks when ready
questions.correctAnswer: To request random numbers from the threshold network and receive callbacks when ready

questions.question: A lottery can move from CLOSED state back to OPEN state if no one claims the prize.
How does buying multiple lottery entries increase your chances of winning?
options: It gives you a higher random number
Your address gets pushed to the participants array multiple times, increasing selection probability
It reduces the entry fee for others
It automatically claims the prize if you win
questions.correctAnswer: Your address gets pushed to the participants array multiple times, increasing selection probability

questions.question: The ______ modifier prevents recursive calls to functions that transfer tokens and modify state.
What happens during the DRAWING state?
options: The contract waits for dcipher network to generate randomness and call back
The winner can claim their prize
questions.correctAnswer: The contract waits for dcipher network to generate randomness and call back

questions.question: Who can call the drawWinner function?
options: Anyone, once the lottery has ended
questions.correctAnswer: Anyone, once the lottery has ended

questions.question: The solver fee for cross-chain claims is added on top of the prize pool.
